// SNAPSHOT — excerpt of lib/internal/Magento/Framework/Webapi/ServiceInputProcessor.php
// from magento/magento2 at tag 2.4.8-p2, fetched 2026-07-17.
//
// This is a SNAPSHOT and CANNOT detect upstream drift. If Magento refactors this method,
// these fixtures keep passing while the real markers silently stop matching every store
// (failing safe, but to NO SIGNAL). Refresh them when curating CVE-2025-54236 or when the
// marker pair is next touched.

    private function getConstructorData(string $className, array $data): array
    {
        $preferenceClass = $this->config->getPreference($className);
        $class = new ClassReflection($preferenceClass ?: $className);

        try {
            $constructor = $class->getMethod('__construct');
        } catch (\ReflectionException $e) {
            $constructor = null;
        }

        if ($constructor === null) {
            return [];
        }

        $res = [];
        $parameters = $constructor->getParameters();
        foreach ($parameters as $parameter) {
            if (isset($data[$parameter->getName()])) {
                $parameterType = $this->typeProcessor->getParamType($parameter);

                try {
                    $res[$parameter->getName()] = $this->convertValue($data[$parameter->getName()], $parameterType);
                } catch (\ReflectionException $e) {
                    // Parameter was not correclty declared or the class is uknown.
                    // By not returing the contructor value, we will automatically fall back to the "setters" way.
                    continue;
                }
            }
        }

        return $res;
    }
